message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>SARS-CoV-2 variants raise major concerns regarding the control of COVID-19 epidemics. We analyse 40,000 specific RT-PCR tests performed on SARS-CoV-2-positive samples collected between Jan 26 and Feb 16, 2021. We find a high transmission advantage of variants and show that their spread in the country is more advanced than anticipated.</jats:p>
title: Rapid SARS-CoV-2 variants spread detected in France using specific RT-PCR testing
